arts.ttl: Video: Gianluigi Donnarumma Exits PSG-Monaco After Shocking Collision
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain was dealt an injury blow in their contest against AS Monaco on Wednesday night as Gianluigi Donnarumma left the match early in the first half. arts.ttl: Video: Achraf Hakimi Displays Awesome Dribble for Désiré Doué Goal vs. Monaco
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are off to an excellent start for their last Ligue 1 contest of 2024 as they opened the scoring against AS Monaco thanks to a goal from Désiré Doué. arts.ttl: Barcelona Take Transfer Lead Over AC Milan, PSG for €80M-Rated Liverpool Ace
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are grappling with attacking struggles this season, particularly in the UEFA Champions League, where goals have been scarce under Luis Enrique’s leadership. Earlier in 2024, PSG was linked to Liverpool’s dynamic winger Luis Díaz, but those rumors never gained traction. arts.ttl: Man Utd’s £100M-Rated Standout Tipped to Stay Despite PSG, Saudi Arabia Links
arts.sum: Rúben Amorim’s decision to leave Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho out of Manchester United’s group for last Sunday’s derby against Manchester City has added to speculation about Rashford’s future at the club. arts.ttl: New York Red Bulls Sign Former PSG and Bayern Munich Striker, per Report
arts.sum: New York Red Bulls completed a deal to bring Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting to the MLS Cup runners-up.

arts.ttl: Manchester United consider move for PSG’s Nuno Mendes
arts.sum: It had been expected that Nuno Mendes (22) would sign a contract extension at Paris Saint-Germain, however, Manchester United could throw a spanner in the works, according to a report…

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'strongly interested' in reuniting Ruben Amorim with PSG, Portugal star
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly interested in signing Nuno Mendes from Paris Saint-Germain, a player that manager Ruben Amorim worked with at Sporting Lisbon.
